requirements.text: The branch divergence must be reconciled via a merge of main into the feature branch, with all 5 content conflicts resolved
requirements.acceptance: git log --oneline --merges -1 shows a merge commit; git diff --name-only --diff-filter=U returns empty (no unresolved conflicts)

requirements.text: Conflict resolution must favor the feature side for all 5 files, per the investigation findings and user decision
requirements.acceptance: conventions.md has 1-line UI Design pointer (not full content); project.md has stable status + close-memory-audit milestone + Success Criterion #4; tech-stack.md has true # bash blocks (not N/A); DESIGN.md has concrete content (not [FILL] placeholders); SKILL.md has ~127 lines (concrete version)

requirements.text: Dead Python bytecode cache must be removed and prevented from recurring
requirements.acceptance: .omp/scripts/__pycache__/ directory does not exist on disk; grep '__pycache__' .gitignore returns a match; git status --porcelain shows no pycache files

requirements.text: The README.md change (npm-release row) must be committed, not left dirty
requirements.acceptance: git status --porcelain README.md returns empty (clean); the change is in a commit

requirements.text: The reconciled branch must be pushed to origin/main
requirements.acceptance: git status --short --branch shows up to date with origin/main with no ahead/behind indicator

requirements.text: All bead sync state (.br_history, issues.jsonl) must be flushed and committed
requirements.acceptance: br sync --flush-only exits 0; git status --porcelain .beads/ shows no untracked bead state files after commit

requirements.text: The merge commit message must be descriptive, naming both branches and the conflict resolution strategy
requirements.acceptance: git log -1 --format='%s' references both main and feature branch or uses a clear merge message like 'Merge main into feat/... — resolve 5 conflicts favoring feature side'

success_criteria: git log --oneline --merges -1 returns a merge commit
grep 'Zero broken file references' .omp/memory/project/project.md returns a match
git status --short --branch shows no ahead/behind indicator
test -f .omp/RULES.md passes and git diff .omp/RULES.md is empty
git status --porcelain .omp/commands/npm-release.md shows ?? (untracked, out of scope)
